parameter.name: IssuerUri
parameter.description: Used to identity the identity server used

parameter.name: ApiUri
parameter.description: Used to identify the Unity web api

parameter.name: UnifiedSettingsApiUri
parameter.description: Used to identify the uri for the Unified Setting API

parameter.name: RedirectUri
parameter.description: Used to redirect the user to the Unity web site

parameter.name: LandingClientId
parameter.description: The client name for the Landing web

parameter.name: LandingScopes
parameter.description: Used to identity the scopes needed to use the APIs

parameter.name: LandingUri
parameter.description: Common email service to use for Unified UI email generation

parameter.name: launchdarkly_SdkKey
parameter.description: Launch Darkly SdkKey

parameter.name: launchdarkly_RelayProxyUrl
parameter.description: Launchdarkly RelayProxy-Url

parameter.name: ActivityMQName
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldLogOpenIdMessages
parameter.description: Should OpenId messages be logged

parameter.name: StatusCheck
parameter.description: Used to check if servers are running correctly

parameter.name: Environment
parameter.description: Activity Command environment

parameter.name: LogPath
parameter.description: Local path for writing logs

parameter.name: KafkaTopicName
parameter.description: Index Kafka Topic Name to search

parameter.name: KafkaCluster
parameter.description: Kafka Cluster Urls

parameter.name: LoggingExcludedProperties
parameter.description: Excluded Properties

parameter.name: LoggingMinimumLevel
parameter.description: Serilog Logging Minimum Level

parameter.name: ElasticApm_Enabled
parameter.description: Flag to on and off the APM

parameter.name: Environment
parameter.description: Used by APM

parameter.name: ElasticApm_ServerUrl
parameter.description: APM Server Url

parameter.name: ElasticApm_ServiceVersion
parameter.description: APM Server Version / Branch Name

parameter.name: ElasticApm_TransactionSampleRate
parameter.description: TransactionSampleRate 1.0 for lower and 0.1 for PROD
